title: 1.20.1 Beta-fied
description: Converts Minecraft 1.20.1 into Beta 1.5_01 without any additional blocks, mobs, or items added!
body:
# Endulge yourself in the nostalgia of Minecraft Beta 1.5_01 with this Beta-fied version of Minecraft 1.20.1! 
Play all your favorite Fabric mods, while living it up like it's 2011!

_This pack is best experienced when you add your own mods to it!_

## GOLDEN DAYS:
Includes a SLIGHTLY modified version of Golden Days (alters door sounds, and path blocks) to make it more authentic.
I do not claim the rights to this pack, and do not intend to infringe on it!

https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/golden-days

### NOTE:
This pack does not REMOVE any items from 1.20.1 outright, you can still access them from the creative menu OR through the default world preset, this pack simply replicates the look and feel of beta!

### To make bedrock spawn at Y-0 Go to "Datapacks" and add the Moderner Beta one listed on the left!
